prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 83 名，近年排名在 74–85 之间波动，整体稳定；2024 年声誉偏负面（陕西文科投档线异常），2026 年声誉偏负面（校内通报涉及师德师风质疑）；抖音热度总排名第 51 位（较热），关注度中等；风景园林学 A+（全国顶尖），林学、林业工程等学科实力突出，对农林类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程等工科专业热度持续较高；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 15.4 万，较 2025 年约 11.6 万大幅增加约 32%，物理类估算约 11.1 万人，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动特征、2026 年物理类计划小幅缩招、本省考生总数大幅增加以及声誉偏负面等因素，考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧效应超过缩招的缓解作用，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准 10992 名附近略有后移；预测最低位次约 10932 名，区间 10432–11432 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 10803→8809→14116→11694→10992, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, it dropped sharply to 14116, then stabilized to 11694–10992 in 2024–2025, with a baseline of about 10992 in 2025; the provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 73–74 from 2021 to 2024, increased to 76 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 73, a slight reduction of about 3.9% compared to 2025, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, fluctuating between 74–85 in recent years, overall stable; reputation was slightly negative in 2024 (abnormal admission line for liberal arts in Shaanxi), and slightly negative in 2026 (internal reports involving teacher ethics concerns); Douyin popularity ranked 51st overall (relatively popular), with moderate attention; Landscape Architecture is A+ (top nationally), Forestry, Forestry Engineering and other disciplines are strong, attracting agriculture and forestry students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular; the total number of provincial general college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from approximately 116,000 in 2025, with an estimated 111,000 in the physics category, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation characteristics of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 physics category enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of provincial candidates, and the slightly negative reputation, the intensified competition from the expanded candidate pool outweighs the easing effect of the enrollment reduction. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly drop from the 2025 baseline of 10992; predicted minimum ranking is about 10932, with a range of 10432–11432.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10432–11432, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 10432), you can focus on competitive Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is near the upper limit (around 11432), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Forestry and Biological Sciences, which are strengths of Beijing Forestry University, and ensure Tier 3 majors as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category fluctuated significantly: approximately 2519 → 1077 → 2539 → 1811 → 1258; in 2022, it moved sharply forward to 1077, in 2023 it moved back to 2539, and in 2024–2025 it stabilized in the 1811–1258 range, with a baseline of about 1258 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 7 in 2024, and fell back to 6 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 8 students, an increase of about 33% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; reputation was slightly negative in 2024 (abnormal admission cutoff in Shaanxi liberal arts), and slightly negative in 2026 (questions about teacher ethics); Douyin popularity total ranking 51st (relatively popular), with moderate attention; Landscape Architecture A+, which has average relevance to liberal arts admission majors (Business Administration, International Economics and Trade, Natural Geography and Resource Environment, etc.), but enhances the overall school brand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors is generally stable; the total number of students taking the provincial general college entrance examination in 2026 is about 154,000, with an estimated 43,000 in the history category, an increase of about 32% compared to about 32,600 in 2025, intensifying competition; the 33% enrollment expansion roughly offsets the 32% increase in examinees, but the slightly negative reputation may slightly reduce application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as drastic fluctuations in historical rankings, a significant expansion of the history category enrollment plan in 2026, a notable increase in the total number of provincial examinees, and a slightly negative reputation, the effects of enrollment expansion and examinee increase largely offset each other, and the slightly negative reputation may slightly decrease application enthusiasm; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1540, with a range of 1263–1817.
